info.title: EDULAMAD API
info.description:
**EDULAMAD API** — NestJS backend with Convex, R2, and optional QStash background jobs.

**OpenAPI / Swagger:** This UI is served only when `NODE_ENV` is `development` or `qa`. It is **disabled in production** (`NODE_ENV=production`).

**Feature status (this deployment):**
- Payments disabled

**Feature toggles (env):** `FEATURE_REDIS_ENABLED`, `FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED`, `FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED`, `FEATURE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_ENABLED`, `FEATURE_OBJECT_STORAGE_ENABLED`, `FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED`, `FEATURE_AI_ENABLED`, `FEATURE_PAYMENTS_ENABLED` — set to `true` or `false`.

**Auth (email verification):** Register returns JWTs immediately; verification links use `FRONTEND_PUBLIC_URL` (or `FRONTEND_URL`) + `/verify-email?token=`. `POST /auth/verify-email` and `GET /auth/verify-email` return **new** `accessToken`, `refreshToken`, and `user` (with `emailVerified: true`). Resend: `POST /auth/resend-verification` (body `{ email }`) or `POST /auth/resend-verification/me` (Bearer JWT; rate limited when Redis is on). Forgot password returns `{ sent: true }`; reset returns `{ success: true }`.

**Subscriptions & Paystack:** `GET /subscriptions/plans` lists Convex plan ids. `POST /subscriptions/subscribe` (JWT) body `{ planId, callbackUrl }` returns `authorizationUrl` + `reference`. After Paystack redirects to your `callbackUrl?reference=`, call `GET /payments/verify/:reference` with the same user JWT. Paystack server webhook: `POST /payments/webhook` (preferred) or legacy `POST /subscriptions/webhooks/paystack` — requires raw body + `x-paystack-signature` when payments are enabled.

**Background jobs:** Uploads and notifications use QStash when `FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED=true`. Callback: `POST {QSTASH_CALLBACK_BASE_URL}/internal/qstash/jobs` (Upstash-signed). Mail and Paystack webhooks can be processed via jobs `send-email` and `paystack-webhook` when jobs are enabled.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Register, login, refresh, email verify (returns new JWTs), resend, forgot/reset password

tags.name: institutions
tags.description: Universities, colleges, departments, courses (public reads + admin writes)

tags.name: content
tags.description: Course offerings, assessment uploads, solution keys, review workflow, document fetch

tags.name: questions
tags.description: Past questions and upload queue (non-content-module routes)

tags.name: quiz
tags.description: Practice quizzes built from approved questions

tags.name: subscriptions
tags.description: Plans, current subscriptions, Paystack subscribe, upload fee, legacy Paystack webhook

tags.name: payments
tags.description: GET verify by reference (JWT); POST Paystack webhook (preferred URL for new integrations)

tags.name: admin
tags.description: Platform admin: stats, content pipeline, promo, notifications, tooling

bio.example: Software engineer passionate about NestJS and TypeScript

profilePhoto.description: Profile photo URL or S3 key

referralCode.description: Optional referral code (e.g. EDU-XXXXX) for the referrer to earn credits when verified

refreshToken.description: Refresh token received from login or register

token.description: Email verification token sent to user email

email.description: User email address to send password reset link

token.description: Password reset token received via email

questionCount.description: Non-deleted past questions for course + year + level

slidesCount.description: Non-deleted slide decks for the course

applied.description: Echo of effective year/level used for question counts

profileIncomplete.description: True when the user has no student profile or no department — list is empty

studentCategory.description: Student program category in Ghanaian university context

deptId.description: If set, ensures the course belongs to this department

title.description: Display title for the slide deck

flashcards.description: Optional flashcard deck JSON matching FlashcardUploadBundle schema. If provided, a deck linked to this slide will be created and published automatically.

subPart.description: Sub-part label when questions are split (e.g. "a")

isVerified.description: When true, solutions are stored as verified (official/TA imports)

extractedContent.description: Raw or OCR text for the deck

isPublished.description: Set visibility for students when your app enforces `isPublished`

academicYear.description: Academic year in YYYY/YYYY format (end year = start year + 1)

sourceDocumentId.description: Convex source document id (IA, final, or slide id)

rating.description: SM-2 quality rating. 0-1: forgot completely, 2: wrong but familiar, 3: remembered with difficulty, 4: remembered, 5: easy

sessionId.description: Session ID to associate this review with

deckId.description: Deck ID the card belongs to

mode.description: spaced_repetition: due cards only | quick_fire: timed 10s/card | full_review: all cards | weak_cards: struggling cards

jsonData.description: Inline JSON string matching FlashcardUploadBundle schema. Required if no file is uploaded.

vote.description: Toggle: same vote again removes the vote.

excludeSeen.description: If true, exclude question ids the user has already seen in prior practice simulations for this course (server-backed).

answers.description: Map of questionId → user answer text

studentId.description: Convex users table id of the recipient

questionCredits.description: Question credits granted per redemption (>=1 if used)

creditExpiresAt.description: Unix ms when granted credits expire
Unix ms when granted credits expire

mnemonic.example: BI-nary = TWO. Bicycle has 2 wheels, binary tree has 2 children.

explanation.description: Explanation of how to use the mnemonic
explanation.example: Think of a bicycle whenever you need to remember the max children constraint.
